Reading the Pro · The five Pros

You've met these five before.

In Asset 2 you filled a notebook page on each of these Pros — what their business needs. Now add the second layer: how each one is showing up on the call, and what that tells you to do differently.

For each Pro: skim what you already know, hear them on the call, then read the signal and name the adjustment.

All five Pros · complete

Five Pros, five different reads.

  • The signal is in how they show up, not what they say. Same discovery, five people — the read changes your move each time.
  • When nothing spikes, don't invent a signal. Maria is the reminder: reading absence accurately is its own skill, and forcing a read is the error.
  • Two layers, together. Business Context decides what you'd recommend; the read decides how you deliver it.
→Use the Continue button (bottom-right) to move on.
